name: Chicken Kabobs
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut garlic.
2. Cut squashes into 1/2 inch thick slices. Remove bones and skin from chicken and cut into 1 1/2 inch cubes; place in a large bowl.
3. Add Paprika and stir to coat the chicken.
4. Combine white wine, vegetable oil, rosemary, and garlic; pour over chicken. Marinate at room temperature for 1 hour.
5. About 30 minutes before serving, bring broth to a boil in a medium saucepan. Stir in rice. Cover tightly and simmer for 20 minutes. Remove from heat and let stand, tightly covered until all liquid is absorbed (about 5 minutes).
6. Stir in green onions.
7. Meanwhile, thread chicken and squashes onto skewers. Brush with marinade.
8. Cook over high heat or on a charcoal grill for 4 to 5 inches from the heat, for 8 to 10 minutes, or until chicken is cooked through. Turn once and baste with marinade during cooking.
9. Arrange kabobs over rice to serve.
